MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Daniel B. Newbold, Esq., for Andrea and Erica Simmons, Petitioners.
Patrick Larsen, Esq., for John Kenny, Trustee.

At the outset, Mr. Newbold reports on the status of the accounting and requests a continuance of approximately 120 days to allow the parties to work on resolving this matter. No objection to the preceding is presented.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Jul-15-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
